policy.duplicate_records: preserve because distinct physical copies cannot be ruled out
policy.external_metadata: use exact ISBN matches only; never replace a non-empty CLZ value without a manual, sourced override
policy.cover_metadata: prefer exact ISBN matches; otherwise require a strict title-author-year-publisher edition match and preserve provider provenance
